description.mekanism_extra_modules.phase: Consumes 500 kFE/t while enabled to cancel incoming damage and death events.
description.mekanism_extra_modules.chaos: Requires Phase Guard to be active. Protects against Draconic Evolution Chaos Guardian laser health-write bypasses.
description.mekanism_extra_modules.emerg: Consumes 10 MFE on lethal damage to cancel death, restore 4 health, and apply short totem-style effects.
